title: Ordinance Enacting the Supplemental Budget for the Year 2021 in the Amount of Nine Hundred Thousand Pesos and 00/100 (P900,000.00) From the 20% Municipal Development Fund Continuing Appropriation Covering the Procurement of Additional Medical Supplies and Materials for the Implementation of the Microplan for Covid-19 Vaccination of the Municipal Government of Los Baños Through the Municipal Health Office.
